title: Brand Equity Diagnostics
use_when: Diagnose brand health and brand equity using awareness, familiarity, associations, and Brand Asset Valuator dimensions. Use for brand performance, differentiation, relevance, esteem, knowledge, brand strength, brand stature, and brand portfolio diagnosis.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Brand Equity Diagnostics when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Brand Equity Diagnostics strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
framework_fit: Brand Equity Diagnostics fits Marketing work in the Strategize lifecycle when the user needs Brand Equity Diagnostics strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Brand Equity Diagnostics strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move without tying recommendations to the user's Strategize stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Brand Equity Diagnostics as generic Marketing advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Brand Equity Diagnostics when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $brand-equity-diagnostics to turn this brand context into a decision-ready Brand Equity Diagnostics strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move.
examples.expected_artifact: Brand Equity Diagnostics strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
